series_metadata.series_title: Abuse and Neglect Investigation Case Fil
series_metadata.series_description: The file contains information gathered in abuse and neglect investigations and the index cards are used for cross referencing the files.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Expunge files of unsubstantiated cases and destroy all accumulated cases on a quarterly basis. Substantiated cases will be retained 10 years, then referred for archive review and destroy if of no archival value., Paper: Shred
